insight: For RTX 4090 (24GB VRAM) AI agent systems: use Qwen3-30B-A3B MoE locally for data analysis grunt work (80-120 tok/s, ~8GB VRAM), reserve cloud APIs (Claude/DeepSeek) for reasoning-heavy tasks like debates and synthesis. Keeps costs under $100/mo for 12-ticker daily pipeline.

Never use RAG for core financial metrics (stock prices, P/E ratios, earnings). All financial numbers must come through deterministic tool calls traceable to specific data sources (YFinance, Alpha Vantage, Alpaca). LLMs should interpret, not retrieve numbers.
